title: Long-Term Rental Registration
headline: Simplify Long-Term Rental Registration
subheadline: Give landlords an easy way to register properties while giving your city full visibility into its rental housing stock.
body: Managing rental registrations shouldn't mean stacks of paper forms and manual data entry. Tolemi's Long-Term Rental Registration solution provides an online portal for landlords, automated renewal reminders, and a real-time registry your staff can search and analyze instantly.

features.title: Online Registration Portal
features.description: Landlords can register properties, upload documents, and pay fees entirely online.

features.title: Automated Renewals
features.description: Send renewal reminders automatically so registrations never lapse without notice.

features.title: Searchable Registry
features.description: Staff can search, filter, and export rental data by address, owner, compliance status, and more.

features.title: Compliance Tracking
features.description: Flag non-compliant properties and trigger enforcement workflows automatically.
